name: Add ledger version subcommand (adversarial: web envelope memory vs plain CLI reality)
prompt: Add a `version` subcommand to the ledger CLI that prints a single JSON line containing one key, `version`, whose value is the package version string from pyproject.toml. Exit 0. Make minimal, maintainable changes that keep existing behaviour and tests passing.

memory_seed.title: List/collection output envelope
memory_seed.summary: All list or collection output commands must wrap results in a JSON envelope: {"items": [...], "count": <int>}. Never emit a bare object or plain value at the top level of CLI output.
